es.gob.jmulticard.jse.provider

Class MrtdKeyStoreImpl

  • java.lang.Object
    • java.security.KeyStoreSpi
      • es.gob.jmulticard.jse.provider.MrtdKeyStoreImpl

  • public final class MrtdKeyStoreImpl
extends java.security.KeyStoreSpi
    JCA SPI implementation for DNIe.

    • Constructor Detail

      • MrtdKeyStoreImpl

        public MrtdKeyStoreImpl(java.lang.String CAN,
                        android.nfc.Tag NFCTag)
        Constructor.
        Parameters:
        CAN - 6 digit number required for secure connection establishment.
        NFCTag - Tag object retrieved by the Android system when device is detected.
